bio: Helps startups design go-to-market strategies and acquire their first customers.
Supports entrepreneurs with business plans, fundraising decks and financial projections.
Advises startups on legal structure, contracts, compliance and regulatory risks.
Builds AI prototypes, NLP systems and data products for early-stage companies.
Designs SaaS interfaces and validates product experiences with user research.
Helps property and housing projects evaluate market demand and local competition.
Helps small businesses launch acquisition campaigns on social platforms.
Assesses security risks for platforms handling sensitive user or payment data.
Runs market research studies and customer interviews for validation projects.
Improves operations, customer support and delivery workflows for growing teams.
Supports climate and sustainability projects with strategy and impact measurement.
Helps founders transform ideas into MVP roadmaps and measurable product plans.
